title: UniBond No More Nails Invisible, Heavy-Duty Clear Glue, Strong Glue for Wood, Ceramic, Metal & More, Instant Grab Mounting Adhesive, 1 x 184g Tube , White
features: No nails – This invisible glue is ideal for heavy-duty adhesion for DIY mounting & repair jobs and eliminates the need for mounting with nails. Applies white, dries translucent.
Multi-functional – This wood glue is suitable for many other materials such as concrete, plaster, brick or stone, as well as being an effective metal glue, ceramic glue and plastic glue*.
Extra strength – This strong instant grab adhesive is specially designed for interior use, providing strong bonds for DIY, mounting and repair jobs in the house.
Interior use – No nails adhesive extra strong works as a coving adhesive and is ideal for fixing skirting boards, polystyrene mouldings, window ledges and coat hooks etc.
Practical Delivery - UniBond No More Nails Invisible, heavy duty adhesive for DIY/repair jobs with water-based copolymer technology, solvent free, no cartridge gun needed, translucent, 1 x 184g Tube
description: From the manufacturer The Henkel brand UniBond offers a wide range of DIY and professional products. The brand emphasises quality, user-friendliness and reliability. Founded in 1876, Henkel holds globally leading market positions in both the consumer and industrial businesses. UniBond No More Nails Original No More Nails Original is a high performance adhesive that eliminates the need for nails and screws in many DIY and repair jobs. Hence, any light DIYer can find the quick, easy and convenient solution for his or her bonding project. It can be used on most materials and is especially effective as it has one of the strongest initial grabs available by UniBond. The power adhesive provides unparalleled support for heavier objects – the high strength adhesive for interior use. For indoor use High strength grab adhesive Adheres to most building materials No more nails! The strong instant grab adhesive makes the use of nails and screws obsolete for most DIY jobs and projects. It holds instantly and even adheres reliably and permanently on heavy construction materials. These include wood, plaster, concrete, brick, stone, metal, polystyrene, ceramic and PVC. For a perfect result, one of the two surfaces should be absorbent as the glue dries by water evaporation and is non-hazardous. Moreover, the adhesive can be used to fill minor gaps on uneven surfaces, for a smooth outcome. The heavy duty adhesive comes in a handy tube that is safe and easy to use. Tips and tricks The high strength grab adhesive works especially well if one of the two surfaces is absorbent. An absorbent surface means that the material lets liquid pass through, either partially or totally. Before application, the surfaces need to be clean, dry and free of loose material, dust, oil, grease and polish. In order to get the strongest adhesion, the adhesive should be applied with a twisting motion to maximise the contact area. Excess adhesive can easily be removed with water. The tube should be stored in a cool and dry place and should be protected from direct sunlight and frost. UniBond No More Nails Original No More Nails is a strong instant grab adhesive that can be used on construction materials as a substitute for nails and screws. The adhesive is the reliable and long-lasting bonding solution for interior space. UniBond No More Nails Invisible No More Nails Invisible adhesive is white when applied but dries translucent. It is paintable when dry and is thus especially useful for high-visibility areas. The adhesive should only be used indoors to assure a perfect and permanent result. The DIY high strength adhesive The instant grab adhesive is the convenient and easy solution for all DIY and repair jobs in interior areas. It can be applied without a cartridge gun and provides a sustainable and extra powerful bond.
